AngularTS
    Preparing search index...
    • InjectionTokenMap

    Interface InjectionTokenMap

    Public injectable contracts keyed by their canonical runtime token.

    Every single-dollar token exposed by [[PublicInjectionTokens]] must map to a named, documented contract here. Double-dollar framework internals are intentionally excluded.

    interface InjectionTokenMap {
        $anchorScroll: AnchorScrollService;
        $angular: Angular;
        $animate: AnimateService;
        $aria: AriaService;
        $compile: CompileFn;
        $controller: ControllerService;
        $cookie: CookieService;
        $document: Document;
        $element: Element;
        $eventBus: EventBus;
        $exceptionHandler: ExceptionHandler;
        $filter: FilterService;
        $htmlCanvas: HtmlCanvasService;
        $http: HttpService;
        $httpParamSerializer: HttpParamSerializer;
        $injector: InjectorService;
        $interpolate: InterpolateService;
        $location: Location;
        $log: LogService;
        $machine: MachineService;
        $parse: ParseService;
        $rest: RestFactory;
        $rootElement: HTMLElement;
        $rootScope: Scope;
        $sce: SceService;
        $sceDelegate: SceDelegateService;
        $scope: Scope;
        $security: SecurityPolicy;
        $serviceWorker: ServiceWorkerService;
        $sse: SseService;
        $state: StateService;
        $stateRegistry: StateRegistryService;
        $stream: StreamService;
        $templateCache: TemplateCacheService;
        $templateRequest: TemplateRequestService;
        $transitions: HookRegistry;
        $wasm: WasmService;
        $webComponent: WebComponentService;
        $websocket: WebSocketService;
        $webTransport: WebTransportService;
        $window: Window;
        $worker: WorkerService;
        $workflow: WorkflowService;
    }
    Index

    Properties

    $anchorScroll $angular $animate $aria $compile $controller $cookie $document $element $eventBus $exceptionHandler $filter $htmlCanvas $http $httpParamSerializer $injector $interpolate $location $log $machine $parse $rest $rootElement $rootScope $sce $sceDelegate $scope $security $serviceWorker $sse $state $stateRegistry $stream $templateCache $templateRequest $transitions $wasm $webComponent $websocket $webTransport $window $worker $workflow
